maintext: Josh Cohen, known as PacBell, was a DEF CON Goon inducted into the Goon Hall of Fame. His Goon bio described him as a "Ted Turner Wannabe (DEF CON TV Engineer), RBOC, Network Flunkie, Deputy Schmoozer" with superpowers including "taking over cable networks without breaking a sweat, cabling/crimping for 36 hrs straight, reading minds of lame telco installers." His favorite con moment was Hacker Jeopardy. Josh passed away on February 22, 2005 at the age of 26.

contributions.title: DEF CON Goon
contributions.description: Served as a volunteer Goon at DEF CON.
